description: Loop Over Items for chunked bulk API: POST up to 50 IDs per request with executeOnce on the HTTP node within each batch so one request carries the whole batch.

conversation.text: Daily at midnight, fetch all pending user IDs from GET https://api.example.com/users/pending-update and push them to POST https://api.example.com/users/bulk-update. The endpoint accepts at most 50 IDs per request — if there are more than 50, send them in chunks.

outcomeExpectations: A Loop Over Items node batches IDs with batch size 50 (or equivalent chunking for the 50-ID limit).
Each bulk-update HTTP request sends one POST per batch carrying multiple IDs (executeOnce on the HTTP node within the batch), not one POST per individual ID inside a batch.
The loop output feeds batch processing and flows back into the Loop Over Items node; the done output leads to a post-loop step.

executionScenarios.name: fifty-five-ids-two-requests
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. POST https://api.example.com/users/bulk-update is called exactly twice — first with 50 IDs, second with 5 IDs — not 55 separate POSTs with one ID each. All 55 IDs are included across the two requests.
